search_document:
User Request: Low stock products.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Low Stock Products
Type: table
Description: List of products with low stock levels
Title: Low Stock Product Categories
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of low stock products by category
Title: Total Low Stock Products
Type: kpi
Description: Count of products below reorder level

sql_queries.title: Low Stock Products
sql_queries.description: List of products with low stock levels
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitsInStock, ReorderLevel FROM Products WHERE UnitsInStock < ReorderLevel

sql_queries.title: Low Stock Product Categories
sql_queries.description: Distribution of low stock products by category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS LowStockCount FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID WHERE p.UnitsInStock < p.ReorderLevel GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Total Low Stock Products
sql_queries.description: Count of products below reorder level
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalLowStockProducts FROM Products WHERE UnitsInStock < ReorderLevel
